title: Friday Feels
excerpt: Felt a bit frazzled this morning. Went for a run, showered, drove to the studio and worked on several frustrating things on the computer. On my walk to a meeting, I reminded myself that I am full of gratitude and…
body: Felt a bit frazzled this morning. Went for a run, showered, drove to the studio and worked on several frustrating things on the computer. On my walk to a meeting, I reminded myself that I am full of gratitude and joy and I granted myself the permission to let go of things that are no longer serving me. It's hard but letting go is essential for growth. Took a deep breath and at that very moment, saw this.
